items.title: While they didn't get him, Ball represents the type of swing the Raptors should make: plus-shooter, fits along Scottie's timeline, helps create and not just finish possessions.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
While they didn't get him, Ball represents the type of swing the Raptors should make: plus-shooter, fits along Scottie's timeline, helps create and not just finish possessions. 

There aren't that many of those guys available, of course.

items.title: Jeff Teague REACTS to Rich Paul saying Scottie Pippen was MORE IMPACTFUL than Michael Jordan
items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Jeff Teague, DJ Wells, and B Hen react to Rich Paul saying that Scottie Pippen was MORE IMPACTFUL than Michael Jordan during the Chicago Bulls’ run of six NBA championships. Jeff talks about how the Bulls had the same record the year MJ “retired” to play baseball, and that MJ…
